scripts.dev: concurrently --names web,api --prefix-colors blue,green "pnpm --dir apps/web dev" "cd services/analytics && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload"
scripts.dev:local: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d db && concurrently --names web,api --prefix-colors blue,green "pnpm --dir apps/web dev" "cd services/analytics && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload"
scripts.dev:api: cd services/analytics && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload
